changeSet.author: dts-copilot-sprint22

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM copilot_ai.biz_enum_dictionary WHERE source_db = 'rs_cloud_flower' AND table_name = 't_flower_biz_info' AND field_name = 'biz_type' AND code = '10'

changeSet.author: dts-copilot-sprint22

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM copilot_ai.biz_enum_dictionary WHERE source_db = 'rs_cloud_flower' AND table_name = 't_recovery_info_item' AND field_name = 'recovery_type'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO copilot_ai.biz_enum_dictionary (source_db, table_name, field_name, code, label, description, sort_order) VALUES ('rs_cloud_flower', 't_recovery_info_item', 'recovery_type', '1', '报损', '绿植无法继续使用', 1), ('rs_cloud_flower', 't_recovery_info_item', 'recovery_type', '2', '回购', '客户付费保留绿植', 2), ('rs_cloud_flower', 't_recovery_info_item', 'recovery_type', '3', '留用', '库房留用，下次再摆', 3);

changeSet.author: dts-copilot-sprint22

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM copilot_ai.biz_enum_dictionary WHERE source_db = 'rs_cloud_flower' AND table_name = 't_recovery_info' AND field_name = 'status'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO copilot_ai.biz_enum_dictionary (source_db, table_name, field_name, code, label, description, sort_order) VALUES ('rs_cloud_flower', 't_recovery_info', 'status', '1', '待回收', '回收单已生成等待执行', 1), ('rs_cloud_flower', 't_recovery_info', 'status', '2', '确认入库', '回收人确认入库', 2), ('rs_cloud_flower', 't_recovery_info', 'status', '3', '已结束', '回收流程完结', 3);

changeSet.author: dts-copilot-sprint22

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM copilot_ai.biz_enum_dictionary WHERE source_db = 'rs_cloud_flower' AND table_name = 't_change_info' AND field_name = 'change_type'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO copilot_ai.biz_enum_dictionary (source_db, table_name, field_name, code, label, description, sort_order) VALUES ('rs_cloud_flower', 't_change_info', 'change_type', '1', '销售金额变更', 'totalAmount 修改', 1), ('rs_cloud_flower', 't_change_info', 'change_type', '2', '库房物品类型变更', 'good_price_id 修改', 2), ('rs_cloud_flower', 't_change_info', 'change_type', '3', '成本变更', 'cost 修改', 3), ('rs_cloud_flower', 't_change_info', 'change_type', '4', '起租减租变更', 'start/end_lease_time 修改', 4);

changeSet.author: dts-copilot-sprint22

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM copilot_ai.biz_enum_dictionary WHERE source_db = 'rs_cloud_flower' AND table_name = 't_change_info' AND field_name = 'status'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO copilot_ai.biz_enum_dictionary (source_db, table_name, field_name, code, label, description, sort_order) VALUES ('rs_cloud_flower', 't_change_info', 'status', '-1', '作废', '变更单作废', 1), ('rs_cloud_flower', 't_change_info', 'status', '1', '确认中', '变更单等待确认', 2), ('rs_cloud_flower', 't_change_info', 'status', '2', '已结束', '变更单已生效', 3);

changeSet.author: dts-copilot-sprint22

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM copilot_ai.nl2sql_routing_rule WHERE domain = 'flowerbiz' AND priority < 90

changeSet.sql: UPDATE copilot_ai.nl2sql_routing_rule SET keywords = '["报花","报花单","业务单","加花","加摆","新增绿植","换花","减花","撤摆","撤花","退植","调花","调拨","售花","销售","卖花","内购","坏账","辅料","加盆架","减盆架","审核中","驳回","备货中","核算中","待结算","已完成","作废","起租","减租","净增","净减","养护人","养护师傅","项目经理","申请人","完工时间","加急","紧急"]', secondary_views = '["v_monthly_settlement","v_project_green_current","v_project_overview"]', priority = 90, updated_at = now() WHERE domain = 'flowerbiz';
changeSet.rollback: UPDATE copilot_ai.nl2sql_routing_rule SET keywords = '["加花","换花","减花","调花","报花","坏账","售花","业务单","审批","驳回","审核","备货"]', secondary_views = '[]', priority = 0, updated_at = now() WHERE domain = 'flowerbiz';
